name: Jalapeno Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup jalapeno cheese, grated (or cheddar cheese, grated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine milk and butter until well mixed.
3. Add diced jalapeno peppers to the mixture and stir.
4. Stir in grated jalapeno cheese (or cheddar cheese) and salt.
5. Mix in sugar.
6. Gradually add bread flour and yeast, stirring until a dough forms.
7. Turn off the heat and let the dough rest for 10 minutes.
8. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
10. Let cool before serving.
